caption: The video features an interview at MongoDB World 2022, held at the Javits Center in New York, NY. The speaker, Sanjeev Mohan, identified as the Principal of SanjMo, is seen speaking passionately about a topic related to MongoDB. He is dressed in a formal black suit and white shirt, gesturing with his hands to emphasize his points. The background shows a professional setting with other attendees seated and some walking by, indicating a busy conference environment. The lower third graphics display the event details, including hashtags #MDW22 and #theCUBE, along with sponsorship information for MongoDB. The overall atmosphere suggests a focused and informative discussion on technology and database solutions.
